name: Clinical Trial Eligibility Screening Intake
description: Clinical trial eligibility screening intake for research coordinators and clinical staff conducting an initial screen of a patient for potential clinical trial enrollment. Evaluates the diagnosis, the trial's inclusion and exclusion criteria, the patient's interest and understanding, and the consent requirements to produce a clinical trial screening profile with eligibility indicators and next steps. Not medical advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
